user.title: Batpred – Basic Settings
user.description: Configure the core settings for the Batpred battery prediction integration.

data.threads: Threads for plan calculation (auto, 0, or a number)

rates.title: Batpred – Currency & Rates
rates.description: Configure currency symbols and Octopus Energy rate sensors.

data.currency_symbols: Currency symbols (one per line, e.g. £ then p)

inverter.title: Batpred – Inverter Configuration
inverter.description: Configure inverter type, count and power limits. For multiple inverters enter one value per line.

data.inverter_limit: Max AC output per inverter in watts (one per line)
data.inverter_limit_charge: Max charge rate per inverter in watts (one per line)
data.inverter_limit_discharge: Max discharge rate per inverter in watts (one per line)

sensors.title: Batpred – Sensor Mappings
sensors.description: Map Home Assistant sensor entities to Batpred. Enter one entity ID per line. Supports re: regex prefix.

data.load_today: Load energy today sensors (one per line)
data.import_today: Import energy today sensors (one per line)
data.export_today: Export energy today sensors (one per line)
data.pv_today: PV energy today sensors (one per line)
data.inverter_mode: Inverter mode select entities (one per line)

controls.title: Batpred – Control Mappings
controls.description: Map Home Assistant control entities to Batpred. Enter one entity ID per line.

data.charge_rate: Charge rate control entities (one per line)
data.discharge_rate: Discharge rate control entities (one per line)
data.charge_start_time: Charge start time entities (one per line)
data.charge_end_time: Charge end time entities (one per line)
data.discharge_start_time: Discharge start time entities (one per line)
data.discharge_end_time: Discharge end time entities (one per line)

advanced.title: Batpred – Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Fine-tune advanced prediction and scaling options.

data.load_filter_threshold: Max zero-load gap before gap fill (minutes, 1–1440)
data.battery_scaling: Battery scaling factor (one per inverter, one per line)
data.days_previous: Historical load days (one value per line, e.g. 7)

data.threads: Threads for plan calculation (auto, 0, or a number)
